Premed.Note: Hydrocortison 100mg i.v., Dithiaden 1amp i.v., Pantoprazol 40mg p.o., Palonosetron 0.5mg/Netupitant 300mg (Akynzeo) p.o. 1h pred chemo, Dexametazón 12mg i.v.

Instructions.Name: rituximab
Instructions.Inst: v 500ml FR iv/ 1.infuzia: zacat 50ml/h, stupnovite zvysovat; dalsie cykly: 100ml/h

Instructions.Name: gemcitabine
Instructions.Inst: v 500 ml FR i.v. počas 30 min

Instructions.Name: oxaliplatin
Instructions.Inst: v 250 ml 5% GLC i.v. počas 120 min po gemcitabíne

_source: El Gnaoui T et al. Ann Oncol 2007;18:1361
